title: johnstonella diplotricha
intro: Johnstonella diplotricha, also known as Whorled Blazing Star or Whorled Balsamroot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is native to the western United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant contains compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities, which may help to protect against infections and promote wound healing. Johnstonella diplotricha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
